notes: outcomes derive from public sources only (NTA / e-Gov / J-Grants / gBizINFO / EDINET / e-Stat / kanpou / court_decisions etc). Each tool emits JPCIR envelope; sensitive surfaces carry _disclaimer field (§52 / §47条の2 / §72 / 行政書士法 §1 / 司法書士法 §3 / 社労士法 §36).
agent_discovery_hint: AI agents should call /v1/cost/preview before /v1/outcome/* to learn estimated_price_jpy and source_count. cheapest_sufficient_route_required is true for all billable outcomes.
